name: clogex
description: TUI for exploring Claude Code session logs

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.tsx --compile --outfile clogex && cp clogex ~/.local/bin/clogex && rm clogex
scripts.build:npm: bun build src/cli.tsx --outdir dist --target node && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/cli.js > dist/cli.tmp && mv dist/cli.tmp dist/cli.js && chmod +x dist/cli.js
